pkgmetadata.longdescription: python-dlinfoPython wrapper for libcs dlinfoInstall-------.. code sh pip install dlinfo or pipenv install dlinfoUsage-----.. code python from dlinfo import DLInfo lib ctypes.cdll.LoadLibrary(ctypes.util.find_library(c)) dlinfo DLInfo(lib) dlinfo.path libx86_64-linux-gnulibc.so.6
